skills.name: 1password
skills.description: Set up and use 1Password CLI (op). Install CLI, sign in, read/inject secrets.
gotchas: Needs desktop app integration enabled for biometric unlock

skills.name: apple-notes
skills.description: Manage Apple Notes via memo CLI. Create, view, edit, delete, search notes.

skills.name: apple-reminders
skills.description: Manage Apple Reminders via remindctl CLI. List, add, complete, delete reminders.

skills.name: bear-notes
skills.description: Create, search, manage Bear notes via grizzly CLI.

skills.name: blogwatcher
skills.description: Monitor blogs and RSS/Atom feeds for updates.

skills.name: camsnap
skills.description: Capture frames or clips from RTSP/ONVIF cameras.

skills.name: coding-agent
skills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process.

skills.name: docx
skills.description: Create, read, edit Word documents (.docx). Tables, formatting, headers, images.

skills.name: pptx
skills.description: Create, read, edit PowerPoint presentations (.pptx). Slides, layouts, images.
gotchas: Complex layouts may need manual adjustment

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description: Create, read, edit Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx). Formulas, charts, data processing.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: Read, create, merge, split, fill PDF files. OCR support.

skills.name: gog
skills.description: Google Workspace CLI. Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Contacts.
quickStart: gog gmail send --to X --subject Y --body Z
gotchas: Needs OAuth setup first: gog auth add email

skills.name: github
skills.description: GitHub operations via gh CLI. Issues, PRs, CI runs, code review.

skills.name: himalaya
skills.description: CLI email via IMAP/SMTP. List, read, write, reply, search emails.

skills.name: imsg
skills.description: iMessage/SMS CLI. List chats, history, send messages via Messages.app.

skills.name: wacli
skills.description: Send WhatsApp messages or search/sync WhatsApp history.
gotchas: Need to link via QR code first
For sending TO others, not your own chats

skills.name: weather
skills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo.

skills.name: summarize
skills.description: Summarize or extract text/transcripts from URLs, podcasts, local files.

skills.name: video-frames
skills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

skills.name: notion
skills.description: Notion API for creating and managing pages, databases, blocks.

skills.name: obsidian
skills.description: Work with Obsidian vaults (plain Markdown notes).
gotchas: Vaults are just folders of .md files

skills.name: things-mac
skills.description: Manage Things 3 via things CLI. Add/update projects+todos, search tasks.

skills.name: openhue
skills.description: Control Philips Hue lights and scenes.

skills.name: sonoscli
skills.description: Control Sonos speakers (discover/status/play/volume/group).

skills.name: a2a-protocol
skills.description: Agent-to-Agent communication between BJS LABS agents via A2A Relay.

skills.name: memory-retriever
skills.description: Sub-agent memory retrieval. Searches memory files, A2A logs, learning entries.
quickStart: sessions_spawn({ task: 'Search memory for X', label: 'memory-retriever' })
gotchas: Use for 2+ files or cross-day searches to keep context clean

skills.name: agentic-learning
skills.description: Unified learning system. Captures corrections, insights, outcomes with auto-promotion.
gotchas: Ask 'what was at risk?' before logging

skills.name: field-admin
skills.description: Admin skills for field agents. Escalation, nightly reporting, onboarding.
quickStart: Load for any field agent deployment

skills.name: vulkn-office
skills.description: Documentos profesionales para PyMEs mexicanas. Facturas, cotizaciones, contratos.
gotchas: Part of VULKN field agent toolkit

skills.name: peekaboo
skills.description: Capture and automate macOS UI with Peekaboo CLI.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Guide for creating new skills that extend capabilities.
